mapper.select:
/* MenuMapper.myMenuList [Menu.xml] : 로그인시 메뉴 리스트 일괄 조회 */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM MENU m WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND UP_MENU_NO IS NOT NULL OR UP_MENU_NO != '' UNION ALL SELECT * FROM MENU m2 WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND UP_MENU_NO IS NULL OR UP_MENU_NO = '' ) ORDER BY UP_MENU_NO DESC, DISP_ORD
